title: Learn how Professor David J. Malan realized computer science is the field for him.
summary: A YouTube video from CS50 at Harvard University featuring Professor David J. Malan sharing his personal journey of realizing computer science was his field. CS50 is Harvard's introduction to computer science and programming, offered through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension, and OpenCourseWare.
writeup: Professor David J. Malan recounts how he came to realize computer science was the right field for him. The video is a personal narrative from the instructor behind CS50, Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming. CS50 reaches students through multiple platforms, including edX, Harvard Extension, and OpenCourseWare.
